repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.build.cmake: target usage requirements PUBLIC PRIVATE INTERFACE, find_package vs FetchContent, generator expressions, CMakePresets, ctest
fix a React useEffect dependency bug

retrieval_query: cmake target_link_libraries add_library find_package FetchContent generator expression CMakePresets ctest out-of-source

validation_smoke.name: code.build.cmake L3 validation smoke
signals: a clean configure and build from an empty build directory succeeds with no manual edits
ctest runs the registered tests and reports them as passed
linking a consumer target pulls the producer's INTERFACE include dirs without restating them
cmake --build with a different generator or preset produces an equivalent build

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.build.cmake diagnosis smoke
signals: a downstream target fails to find headers that an upstream library uses internally only
find_package reports a package as not found despite it being installed
in-source build artifacts pollute the source tree and shadow a clean configure
a generator expression evaluates to the wrong value because it was compared as a plain string
changing a header does not trigger a rebuild because the dependency was not declared
